hero.heading: HashiCorp Validated Designs
hero.subtitle: Prescriptive reference architectures for deploying and operating HashiCorp tools at scale.

overview.heading: Validated Designs
overview.body: Validated Designs provide opinionated, end-to-end guidance for deploying HashiCorp products. Each design covers a specific product and use case, and is structured to help you adopt best practices from day one.

cards.title: Boundary
cards.description: Reference architectures for deploying and operating HCP Boundary in your organization.

cards.title: Consul
cards.description: Reference architectures for deploying and operating Consul for service mesh and networking.

cards.title: Terraform
cards.description: Reference architectures for structuring and scaling your Terraform estate.

cards.title: Vault
cards.description: Reference architectures for deploying and operating Vault for secrets management.
